title: Vaigaraiyil Vaigaikaraiyil Lyrics Payanangal Mudivathillai
stanzas:
un ninaive enakor shruthi
un kanave enakor kirudhi
un unarvil maname urugi
vaaduthammaa
malar pol karugi

pala pala jenmam
naan eduppen
padalgal kodi
naan padippen

aayiram aayiram aasaigalai
aasaiyil unnidam pesa vandhen
aaviyil maeviya seidhigalai
kaelena nenjidam koora vandhen

ninaivugal engo alaigiradhe
kanavugal yeno kalaigiradhe
nizhal pol unnai
thodargirathe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of being close to someone special.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Payanangal Mudivathillai, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings and romantic aspirations.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on February 26, 1982.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaigaraiyil Vaigaikaraiyil, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of love and connection, beautifully conveyed through the soothing melody. The song's lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a timeless classic. Set against the backdrop of Payanangal Mudivathillai, it enhances the emotional depth of the narrative. With its enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja and heartfelt rendition by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, this song remains a cherished favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaigaraiyil Vaigaikaraiyil from the timeless classic Payanangal Mudivathillai captures the essence of love and longing with its enchanting melody. The collaboration of legendary singer S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the maestro Ilaiyaraaja creates a mesmerizing experience that resonates with listeners. Dive into this nostalgic journey that beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics and soothing music.
stanzaMeanings: In the waves, I will come near you.
In your thoughts, my heart will always wander in the streets.
In the waves, I will come near you.
Your thoughts are my melody, your dreams are my guide, and your feelings melt my heart like a flower.
I will take many births and sing many songs.
My love, I will wait for you.
In the waves, I will come near you.
I have come to speak to you with a thousand desires, and I have brought messages from my heart.
Thoughts are everywhere, dreams seem to be everywhere, like a shadow, they follow you.
In the waves, I will come near you.
In your thoughts, my heart will always wander in the streets.
In the waves, I will come near you.
